title: Himekishi-sama no Himo
titleNative: 姫騎士様のヒモ
synonyms: The Kept Man of the Princess Knight
synopsis: Matthew is just another parasite in the chaotic dungeon city of Gray Neighbor. People say he's a lazy weakling who gambles and drinks away all the money he gets from his keeper, princess knight Arwin. But the truth is, no one in this town knows what he's really like—a ruthless protector who works in the shadows and will do whatever it takes for the sake of his mistress. (Source: Yen Press)

title: Kodoku no Gourmet
titleNative: 孤独のグルメ
synopsis: Inogashira Gorou eats and indulges at restaurants or ramen shops found on any street corners. He has become a liberal foodie removed from social obligations for a fleeting moment to satisfy his hunger. Solitary Gourmet... That's the solitary process of eating without interruption or worry that gives the most comfort to people equally. (Source: Jmanga)

title: Kairyuu to Yuubinya-san
titleNative: カイリューとゆうびんやさん
synopsis: Special animation made to commemorate Pokemon Day 2025. This short follows the story of Hana, a young girl who lives in Paldea and admires the Dragonite postman. She aspires to become a postman but one day finds a letter with no addressee so decides to try and help find the send with her partner Fuecoco. When they find the sender, a boy named Rio, they learn that Rio sent the letter to celebrate the birthday his father who lives in Kanto, and to make it worse, the birthday is today. It's up to Hana, Rio and Dragonite to get the letter to him as soon as they can. (Source: Serebii, edited)

title: Soreike! Anpanman: Chapon no Hero!
titleNative: それいけ！アンパンマン チャポンのヒーロー！
synopsis: The film centers on Chapon, a mysterious boy who falls from the sky without any knowledge of where he came from. Staying with Anpanman, he one day helps someone out and gets to know the joy of making someone smile, and dreams of becoming a hero like Anpanman. But when Baikinman arrives, and reveals the secret of Chapon's origins, Chapon must figure out if his origins or his dreams define who he is. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Araiguma Calcal-dan
titleNative: あらいぐま カルカル団
synopsis: Comedy spin-off to the Araiguma Rascal (Raccoon Rascal) anime. The story is set around five employees working hard in the lesser Tama branch of a secret society aiming for world domination called the Calcal Group: an aspirational new recruit, a polite but self-conscious superior, a modern guy with a cold attitude to everything, a hotheaded but kind senior employee and a handsome older man leading the pack. (Source: Crunchyroll News, edited)

title: Sui Kin Chi Ka Moku Dotten Amen SP Dance PV
titleRomaji: Sui Kin Chi Ka Moku Dotten Amen SP Dance PV
titleNative: 水金地火木土天アーメン SPダンスPV
synonyms: Kimi no Iro Special Dance Video
The Colors Within Special Dance Video
きみの色 劇中歌「水金地火木土天アーメン」描き下ろしSPダンスPV
Amen I'm Going Somewhere Special Dance Video
synopsis: Naoko Yamada-directed anime film Kimi no Iro (The Colors Within) released a special "dance" video – though, it’s a little more on-beat for the creator who enjoys showcasing her characters goofing around and showing their personality through movement. The video contains wholly original footage, presented in a TikTok-like format and follows the three main characters, Kimi, Totsuko and Rui, dancing along to the insert song “Sui Kin Chi Ka Moku Dotten Amen” with moves that are reminiscent of those popular with those who upload short-form dance videos. (Source: Crunchyroll News, edited)

title: I Just Wanted to Say…
titleNative: ねえねえ　あのね
synopsis: Chick tells Mouse, "I love you." Mouse tells Duck, "I love you." Duck tells Rabbit... What happens when Rabbit can't quite get the words out? Animals share their joy and affection with full-body expression in this picture book perfect for reading aloud and with plenty of opportunities for hugs. (Source: Kodansha) Note: Exists in two versions, a 30-second commercial edition and a 2½ minute “Director’s Cut” edition

title: Cat God
titleNative: 猫行东方
synopsis: The story unfolds through the eyes of cats, offering glimpses of intense battlefields, fleeting moments in history, heartfelt family bonds, and imaginative visions of the future. Rendered in a variety of styles, including ink painting, 2D animation, 3D visuals, and stop motion, it captures the essence of Eastern aesthetics. Ten surreal and enigmatic scrolls about cats are revealed, one by one, drawing the audience into their mysterious world.

title: Secret Jouju - Bijou of Star
titleNative: 시크릿쥬쥬 별의 보석
synopsis: Jouju is tasked with finding the hidden Joubijou, balancing good and evil in the celestial world with her dear friends Cindy, Stellar, and the mysterious 'Rosa'. While getting back Joubijou from Lucy 'the treasure hunter', Jouju protects her family and friends from witches and navigates through a magical journey in order to become a true guardian of stars. (Source: Janson Media)

title: Compu Movie
titleNative: コンピュムービー
synopsis: Compu Movie is a VHS video release made by Osamu Sato & produced by O.S.D. (Out Side Directors Company) and released by Tierrart. Featuring of collection of music videos made using Amiga and Macintosh computers and music by Shinobu Narita, Osamu Sato, and The Sync (produced by Goh Hotoda). The VHS was available to purchase through the company only. Compu Movie was considered lost media for a long time as it had not surfaced in full on the internet. (Source: lostmediawiki)
